data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the ability to query event history by various parameters, but the evidence provided does not confirm this capability. While the linked use case outlines the need for queryable event history, there is no direct evidence showing that such functionality is implemented or can be verified through API reads or persisted state checks. The prior step evidence does not include specific event logs or identifiers that would demonstrate compliance with the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of queryable event history by entity, workflow, customer, or time range.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
